name: DiscImageSplitter
author: dmfrey
about: Splits FLAC+CUE disc image downloads into individual tracks for Lidarr import
requirements: ffmpeg and metaflac must be available in PATH (provided by the NZBGet pod init container).
description: Detects single-file FLAC+CUE disc images in the completed download directory,
splits them with ffmpeg, applies tags with metaflac, and places the individual
tracks back into the same completed-download folder using Lidarr naming conventions.
Lidarr picks them up automatically via its normal completed-download import flow.
Does nothing for movies, TV shows, or normal multi-track music releases.
